title: carlina conformis
intro: Carlina conformis, also known as the Carline Thistle, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carlina conformis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Carlina conformis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical creams.
